items.summary: Fenerbahce reportedly agree terms with Cedi Osman to replace NBA-bound Tarik Biberovic (per Sozcu); Osman said to pick Fener over Anadolu Efes.
Federico Poser - Tezenis Verona (extended).
Martynas Arlauskas returns to Jonava Hipocredit after a year away.
Kaunas Žalgiris signs Sterling Brown (ex-Partizan) on a 1+1 deal through the 2027-28 season.
Olimpia Milano signs playmaker Darius Thompson on a three-year contract.
Varese signs Australian playmaker William McDowell-White, EuroCup winner with Bourg.
Mykonos Betsson signs American guard Jermaine Love for 2026-27, arriving from Esenler Erokspor.
DJ Steward leaves Trento via contract buyout; Baskonia set as his next destination.
19-year-old forward Daan Pieters returns to Filou Oostende's regular squad after a loan spell at Okapi Aalst.
UNICS Kazan announces the departure of American playmaker Paris Lee.
Río Breogán signs American playmaker Rasir Bolton (ex-Napoli) for 2026-27.
Casademont Zaragoza signs American wing Caleb Homesley from Bahçeşehir.
LDLC ASVEL announces the return of French forward Yves Pons for 2026-27 (No. 35).
ALBA Berlin signs German guard Julius Böhmer from BG Göttingen on a two-year deal until 2028.
Real Madrid signs Spanish forward Jaime Pradilla from Valencia Basket, reuniting with coach Pedro Martinez.
Cedevita Olimpija signs American point guard Anthony Cowan (28) ahead of 2026/27, arriving from Turkish side Mersin.
Hapoel Tel Aviv extends center Tai Odiase through the 2028-29 season.
Napoli Basketball signs former NBA champion Jack White on a one-year deal.
London Lions sign scoring guard Landrius Horton to a one-year deal.
UNICS Kazan signs Croatian big man Luka Samanic from Zenit on a 1+1 deal.
Hamburg Towers sign French guard Mathys Kangudia from Nantes through at least 2028.
Krka sign experienced American guard Lovell Cabbil Jr. (29).
Nicolò Melli extends his contract with Fenerbahce Beko for two more seasons.
Zenit sign 34-year-old guard Dmitry Kulagin through the 2028/29 season.
Lokomotiv Kuban sign 21-year-old center Gleb Firsov from PARMA on a 3+2 deal.
Andrey Zubkov agrees a contract extension to stay with MBA.
Lokomotiv Kuban sign forward Maksim Barashkov from MBA-MAI through 2027/28.
Uralmash sign 28-year-old forward Igor Volkhin (ex-Zenit, on loan at Avtodor last season).
Uralmash sign Serbian forward Danilo Tasic from Enisey through 2026/27.
UNICS extend guard Alexey Shved for the 2026/27 season.
Uralmash sign 28-year-old American guard Chris Clemons (ex-Houston, played in China, France, Germany).
BETCITY PARMA re-sign 30-year-old American forward BJ Johnson on a one-year deal.
Uralmash sign 30-year-old American guard David Efianyi (last season Petkimspor and Maccabi Tel Aviv).
Uralmash sign 31-year-old guard Mikhail Kulagin (last season Samara then UNICS).
UNICS re-sign 29-year-old American guard CJ Bryce on a one-year deal.
BETCITY PARMA sign 29-year-old center Ilya Karpenkov from Pari NN on a two-year deal.
UNICS appoint Croatian coach Milan Karakaš as head coach (previously assistant there for 5 years).
UNICS part ways with head coach Velimir Perasović, who won them the 2023 VTB League title.
Astana appoint Serbian coach Miodrag Rajković as head coach.
Zenit appoint Dusko Ivanovic as head coach.
Energa Czarni Słupsk sign 25-year-old American big man Demond Robinson (206cm, ex-Murray State/Kennesaw State).
Fenerbahce extend Gabonese center Chris Silva on a 1+1 deal.
Galatasaray MCT Technic sign Turkish national team point guard Sehmus Hazer (27).
Fenerbahce extend American guard Talen Horton-Tucker through the 2026/27 season.
EA7 Emporio Armani Milan signed Nicola Akele to a multi-year deal.
Quinn Ellis has left EA7 Emporio Armani Milan to pursue an opportunity in the United States.
Marcus Carr signs with Virtus as fifth summer addition.
Dubai extends big man Mfiondu Kabengele.
The London Lions have completed the signing of Joshua O'Garro on a one-year deal.
Amedeo Della Valle - Pallacanestro Varese (signed).
Jaylen Barford - UNA Hotels Reggio Emilia (extended).
Chad Brown - Acqua S.Bernardo Cantù (signed).
Alessandro Manfredotti - NutriBullet Treviso Basket (signed).
Nick Ongenda - BAXI Manresa (signed).
Michael Forrest - UCAM Murcia (extended).
Héctor Alderete - La Laguna Tenerife (extended).
Pedro Martínez - Real Madrid (signed).
Lovell Cabbil Jr. - Krka Novo Mesto (signed).
Krševan Klarica - KK Zadar (extended).
Pallacanestro Forlì announces the signing of Marcus Santos-Silva.
Kangoeroes Mechelen signs 2.13-meter center Justin Vander Baan for the upcoming season.
Hapoel Tel Aviv extends power forward Ish Wainright through the 2027-28 season.
Bamberg Baskets sign American wing Jordan Wright on a one-year deal.
Benedikt Turudic leaves Veolia Towers Hamburg after two seasons as his contract expires.
Turk Telekom signs combo guard Jerrick Harding from Rytas Vilnius.
Neptunas Klaipeda signs playmaker Elvar Fridriksson to a one-year deal.
La Laguna Tenerife re-signs power forward Hector Alderete for one more season.
Gladiators Trier sign Austin Crowley from Bamberg following Nolan Adekunle departure.
Real Madrid appoint Pedro Martinez as head coach for the next three seasons, through 2028/29.
Jean Montero leaves Valencia.
Valencia reels in Dylan Osetkowski as second summer recruit.
Giulio Gazzotti - Derthona Tortona (signed).
Giants Antwerp signs 23-year-old shooting guard Jacari White (ex-North Dakota State) on a one-season contract.
Veteran guard Patty Mills agrees to join French EuroLeague club ASVEL Villeurbanne.
Isaac Bonga agreed to join Panathinaikos on a three-year deal after buying out his previous contract.
Sergio De Larrea departs Valencia for the NBA.
La Laguna Tenerife signing Xabi Lopez-Arostegi on a two-year deal.
Jaime Echenique - UNA Hotels Reggio Emilia (extended).
Matteo Parravicini - Acqua S.Bernardo Cantù (signed).
Alessandro Lever - Scafati Basket (signed).
Strahinja Gavrilović - Igokea m:tel (signed).
Kresimir Ljubicić - Arka Gdynia (signed).
Dutch guard/forward Siem Uijtendaal joins Donar Groningen from Den Helder Suns.
FC Barcelona parts ways with former EuroLeague champion Will Clyburn, making him a free agent.
Besiktas brings in Scottie Wilbekin.
Metecan Birsen crosses Istanbul to join Besiktas.
Gonzalo Corbalan has officially signed for Valencia Basket.
NINERS Chemnitz inking veteran forward Urald King to a one-year deal.
Aaryn Rai stays put with London Lions.
Javon Bess signs with U-BT Cluj-Napoca.
Dogus Ozdemiroglu joins Turk Telekom.
Armin Hrštić - Igokea m:tel (signed).
Filip Rebrača - FMP Meridian (extended).
Dominic Green - Górnik Wałbrzych (signed).
Kenny Goins - Górnik Wałbrzych (signed).
Justin Kier - MHP Riesen Ludwigsburg (signed).
Duane Washington - FC Bayern Munich (signed).
Landstede Hammers extends Nelson Haskin's contract by one season through 2026-27.
Power forward Filip Rebrača continues with FMP.
Galatasaray MCT Technic sign Canadian forward Dyshawn Pierre (ex-Fenerbahce, 5 seasons) on a one-year deal.
Besiktas sign Malian forward/center Mady Sissoko.
NINERS Chemnitz confirmed the signing of Cobe Williams on a one-year deal with an option for a further year.
Neptunas signed American center Raymond Somerville for the 2026-27 season with an option for an additional year.
Berlin native Dwayne Koroma returns to Germany with ratiopharm Ulm.
Mo Soluade signs with London Lions.
Aris adds scorer Nenad Dimitrijevic to backcourt.
Carlos Stewart joins Le Mans from Varese ahead of the 2026-27 season.
McKinley Wright - Dubai Basketball (extended).
Lovro Buljević - KK Zadar (extended).
Domen Zevnik - Krka Novo Mesto (signed).
Alex Stein - Arka Gdynia (signed).
Anrijs Miska - PGE Start Lublin (signed).
Michaelyn Scott - Górnik Wałbrzych (signed).
Tobias Jensen - FC Bayern Munich (signed).
Kangoeroes Mechelen signs 2.00-meter American Jalen Hampton (ex-Arkansas).
Lietkabelis adds swingman Keondre Kennedy on a one-year deal.
Derthona renews four players including Prentiss Hubb for the coming season.
Isiaha Mike is back in the EuroCup with Bahcesehir.
Napoli adds forward Assane Sankare.
Jakub Stupnicki - Czarni Słupsk (signed).
Maksymilian Wilczek - Twarde Pierniki Toruń (signed).
Markus Ilver - Legia Warszawa (signed).
Marvin Bähre - Bamberg Baskets (signed).
Brussels Basketball brings back 26-year-old American small forward Tucker Richardson, who played there in 2024-25.
Dwayne Bacon - Dubai Basketball (extended).
Jordan Ford - ALBA Berlin (signed).
American guard Max Klesmit (ex-Wisconsin) joins Kangoeroes Mechelen's backcourt.
Tyrus McGee - Free Agent (left).
Isaac Leggett - MHP Riesen Ludwigsburg (signed).
Nolan Adekunle - Free Agent (left).
Danilo Gavel - FC Bayern Munich (signed).
Val-Dieu Spirou signs 23-year-old American guard Donovan Oday (ex-Northern Kentucky) for two seasons.

items.player: Boyd van der Vuurst de Vries

items.summary: Justin Johnson - Free Agent (left).
Irish international point guard CJ Fulton (1.88m, ex-Charleston) joins Kangoeroes Mechelen as floor leader.
CB Liège signs American point guard Kylen Milton (native of Arkansas) for 2026-27.
Johannes Thiemann - FC Bayern Munich (signed).
Kangoeroes Mechelen adds 25-year-old Latvian small forward Dāvids Vīksne.
Armel Traore - ratiopharm Ulm (signed).
